subject: Automating quote follow-ups for Downtown Air
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Downtown Air and Heat's website and I can see you cover a wide service area around Orlando. That means a lot of incoming service requests to manage.

One thing I noticed is that quote requests come in through a form with no automated follow-up. Studies show that responding within 5 minutes increases conversion by 400%. We help HVAC businesses set up instant auto-responses and smart follow-up sequences so no lead falls through the cracks.

Would a quick 10-minute call this week make sense to see if this could help?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
